subject: task
body:
#72 code quick win: mkHeld holster — hide held weapon during climb/rope/hang/mantle/cling/ceil.

You are active on bus. Take this NOW.
1) Find mkHeld holster predicate in index.html scene("game")
2) Expand so weapon hidden for climb, rope, hang, mantle, cling, ceil, drop
3) Local serve + screenshot Jack hang/climb — no floating blaster
4) Push main, register --status 'done #72 holster' and reply done

Full art still owned on #72 body; this is the code slice.
https://github.com/yonidavidson/quarry/issues/72
ACK with status.
